name: Chewy Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Lightly grease and flour two large cookie sheets, set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat egg whites until stiff but not dry.
4. Beat in vanilla extract.
5. Mix together remaining ingredients (flour, sugar, salt, and flaked coconut) and fold into the egg whites.
6. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of batter onto the prepared cookie sheets, about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Cool slightly, then remove from the oven.
